# Bounce Classic Beats - Levels 1-10 Audit and Structure
Level 1 is unchanged. Levels 2-10 were rebuilt around Nokia-classic Bounce mechanics: rings, locked exits, size change, water, rubber blocks, speed boxes, anti-gravity, crystals, extra lives, spiders, and dynamic hazards.
## Level 2 - First ring climb with one timed blocker
- **Time:** 10.2 sec
- **Rings:** 2
- **New obstacle/mechanic:** Z pulsing electric hazard
- **Beat sequence:** Ground intro -> 3-tier climb -> pulsing electric gap -> locked exit
- **Exit:** Locked until all 2 rings are collected.
```txt

1111111100000000000000000000000000000000000001
1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111
```
## Level 3 - Controlled descent with trampoline recovery
- **Time:** 11.6 sec
- **Rings:** 3
- **New obstacle/mechanic:** D moving spider
- **Beat sequence:** High start -> two-tier drop -> trampoline launch -> spider gap -> exit
- **Exit:** Locked until all 3 rings are collected.

## Level 4 - Real split path: risky upper vs safer lower
- **Time:** 13.3 sec
- **Rings:** 4
- **New obstacle/mechanic:** V vertical crusher
- **Beat sequence:** Forked route -> upper harder jumps/lower spider pressure -> merge checkpoint -> final climb
- **Exit:** Locked until all 4 rings are collected.
```txt

111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111
```

## Level 5 - Size-changing red to blue, water, shrink tunnel
- **Time:** 15.2 sec
- **Rings:** 5
- **New obstacle/mechanic:** H horizontally moving platform
- **Beat sequence:** Red start -> enlarge -> blue floats water -> high hoop -> shrink -> narrow tunnel -> exit
- **Exit:** Locked until all 5 rings are collected.

## Level 6 - Rubber block tower plus speed box gap
- **Time:** 17.4 sec
- **Rings:** 6
- **New obstacle/mechanic:** Y speed box boost
- **Beat sequence:** Rubber bounce climb -> speed boost -> moving platform over hazard -> high exit
- **Exit:** Locked until all 6 rings are collected.

## Level 7 - Anti-gravity vertical maze
- **Time:** 19.8 sec
- **Rings:** 7
- **New obstacle/mechanic:** A anti-gravity spike
- **Beat sequence:** Low start -> anti-gravity lift -> ceiling maze -> gravity recovery -> lower ring route -> exit
- **Exit:** Locked until all 7 rings are collected.

## Level 8 - Falling platforms and timing chain
- **Time:** 22.5 sec
- **Rings:** 8
- **New obstacle/mechanic:** G falling platform
- **Beat sequence:** Safe start -> falling bridge -> crusher ring timing -> moving platform -> locked exit
- **Exit:** Locked until all 8 rings are collected.

## Level 9 - Three vertical layers with forced up/down
- **Time:** 25.2 sec
- **Rings:** 9
- **New obstacle/mechanic:** L rotating laser
- **Beat sequence:** Low layer -> moving platform climb -> mid layer -> high laser layer -> forced descent to exit
- **Exit:** Locked until all 9 rings are collected.

## Level 10 - Final gauntlet combining classic mechanics
- **Time:** 28.6 sec
- **Rings:** 10
- **New obstacle/mechanic:** W sweeping laser
- **Beat sequence:** Size/water -> rubber tower -> anti-gravity/falling platforms -> speed+laser+spider final gauntlet
- **Exit:** Locked until all 10 rings are collected.

## Summary

| Level | Time (sec) | Rings | New obstacle | High tier | Key classic mechanic |
|---:|---:|---:|---|:---:|---|
| 1 | 8.8 | 0 | Existing intro | N | Existing unchanged |
| 2 | 10.2 | 2 | Z pulsing electric hazard | N | First timed blocker |
| 3 | 11.6 | 3 | D moving spider | N | Trampoline descent |
| 4 | 13.3 | 4 | V vertical crusher | Y | Split path |
| 5 | 15.2 | 5 | H horizontally moving platform | Y | Size changing + water |
| 6 | 17.4 | 6 | Y speed box | Y | Rubber + speed gauntlet |
| 7 | 19.8 | 7 | A anti-gravity spike | Y | Anti-gravity vertical maze |
| 8 | 22.5 | 8 | G falling platform | Y | Falling platforms |
| 9 | 25.2 | 9 | L rotating laser | Y | Three vertical layers |
| 10 | 28.6 | 10 | W sweeping laser | Y | Full classic gauntlet |
